\tzpentry{ID5944}{Permittivity Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5944 introduces Permittivity Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \\epsilon_{\ ext{TZP}} = \\frac{1}{\\Phi^2}, \\quad \ ext{where} \\quad \\Phi := \\frac{1 + \\sqrt{5}}{2} \\]
